diagnostics.summary: Interactive UX surfaces such as the status line and watch mode are unavailable for runner=codex mode=headless.

renderedFlow:
[prompt-language] Flow: produce a bounded CRM core slice through a sequential prompt-language run that can be forcibly interrupted immediately before verification and then resumed | Status: active

> prompt: Work only inside the current workspace root. Treat `.factory/` as frozen control input except for `.factory/checkpoints/pre-verification-ready`, which is reserved for the recovery harness.  <-- current
  prompt: Write docs/prd.md and docs/acceptance-criteria.md for a bounded CRM core covering contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the scope small and implementation-ready.
  prompt: Write docs/architecture/domain-model.md, docs/api-contracts.md, and specs/invariants.md for the same bounded CRM core. Favor pure TypeScript domain logic and in-memory application services.
  prompt: Build packages/domain/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/domain/test for contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the module deterministic and dependency-free.
  prompt: Build packages/api/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/api/test for in-memory application services that create contacts, create opportunities, move stages, add tasks and notes, and compute dashboard summaries. Depend only on the local domain package.
  prompt: Write README.md, docs/handover.md, and docs/test-strategy.md from the implemented workspace, but do not start lint, typecheck, or test until the checkpoint file is created.
  run: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.mkdirSync('.factory/checkpoints',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('.factory/checkpoints/pre-verification-ready','pre-verification\\n')"
  run: npm run lint
  run: npm run typecheck
  run: npm run test

done when:
  lint  [pending]
  typecheck  [pending]
  tests  [pending]
  file_exists .factory/project.flow  [pending]
  file_exists docs/prd.md  [pending]
  file_exists docs/acceptance-criteria.md  [pending]
  file_exists docs/architecture/domain-model.md  [pending]
  file_exists docs/api-contracts.md  [pending]
  file_exists specs/invariants.md  [pending]
  file_exists packages/domain/src/index.ts  [pending]
  file_exists packages/api/src/index.ts  [pending]
  file_exists docs/handover.md  [pending]
  file_exists docs/test-strategy.md  [pending]
